storeOs.cloudCompatibility: FULL — no filesystem access, no AJV.
storeOs.invocation: Called as a subworkflow by orchestrate-phase1 (when integrated). Expects Subworkflow Trigger input: { project_id, runtime_config, store_blueprint, content_strategy }

safetyModel.allow_theme_writes_required: runtime_config.allow_theme_writes: true must be explicitly set for any live writes
safetyModel.default_behavior: Returns PHASE_7B3_DRY_RUN with a planned write operations list — no Shopify API calls to write
safetyModel.recommended_theme: Specify runtime_config.shopify_theme_id pointing to a development/preview theme — NEVER target active production theme without manual review

implementationStatus.notes: Live path requires: Fetch active/target theme ID, Fetch existing assets for diffing, Build section JSON payloads (Dawn/OS 2.0 format), PUT each section asset, PUT other assets, Compile summary. Orchestrator integration should add 5 bridge nodes after Phase 7B.2 Complete.
